return(function(R,f,H,J,a,g,s,t,C,V,O,G,L,S,M,U,k,r,w,j,l,z,v,n,q,T)V,O,C,r,T,z,S,t,q,w,G,n,l,k,j,U,L,M,v=function(V,H,J,a)local vI={}local
